chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَنْ يُشْرِكُ قَرَابَتَهُ وَ إِخْوَتَهُ فِي حَجَّتِهِ أَوْ يَصِلُهُمْ بِحَجَّةٍ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 72 – The one who participates his relatives and his brethren in his Hajj, or he links them with Hajj

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/231)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/231)
text: دَخَلْتُ عَلَى أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) فَدَخَلَ عَلَيْهِ الْحَارِثُ بْنُ الْمُغِيرَةِ فَقَالَ بِأَبِي أَنْتَ وَ أُمِّي لِيَ ابْنَةٌ قَيِّمَةٌ لِي عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْ‏ءٍ وَ هِيَ عَاتِقٌ أَ فَأَجْعَلُ لَهَا حَجَّتِي قَالَ أَمَا إِنَّهُ يَكُونُ لَهَا أَجْرُهَا وَ يَكُونُ لَكَ مِثْلُ ذَلِكَ وَ لَا يُنْقَصُ مِنْ أَجْرِهَا شَيْ‏ءٌ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Abu Nasr, from Safwan Al Jammal who said,

‘I went over to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, so Al-Haris Bin Al-Mugheira came over to him<sup>asws</sup>, and he said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘May my father be sacrificed for you<sup>asws</sup>, and my mother! For me is a daughter who stands for me upon everything, and she is a first-born. Can I make my Hajj to be for her?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Its Recompense would happen to be for her, and there would happen to be for you the like of that, and there would not be a reduction from its Recompense, of anything’.
en.sarwar: 3. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from ibn abu Nasr from Safwan al-Jammal who has said the following: “I once went to visit abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, when al-Harith ibn al-Mughirah also came and said, ‘I pray to Allah to keep my soul in service for your cause. I have a daughter who looks after every one of my things and she is the first one. Can I assign my al-Hajj for her? He (the Imam) said, ‘The reward for al-Hajj will be for her and you will have a similar reward without any reduction in her reward.’”
